page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2.13xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 2.5 GHz. It features 56 dedicated physical cores with 1.0 thread per core, providing 56 vCPUs. The instance is configured with 224.0 GB of RAM, yielding a balanced memory-to-core ratio of 4.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, and it operates on a KVM hypervisor with a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps.

Benchmark data reveals a clear contrast between single-core and multi-core performance. Single-core metrics, such as stress-ng and Geekbench single-core scores, fall into the weak category, and single-threaded gzip compression is poor. However, the high physical core count enables average multi-core CPU performance in stress-ng and Geekbench. Notably, multi-threaded bzip3 decompression performs strongly, placing in the top tier. Memory bandwidth and database operations consistently rank in the average tier.

Given its balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and dedicated CPU allocation, this instance is classified as a general-purpose server. It is qualitatively cost-efficient for multi-threaded workloads that can leverage all 56 physical cores, such as parallel software compilation, multi-threaded decompression, and static web serving. However, it is less suitable for single-threaded tasks or applications requiring local NVMe storage or GPU acceleration.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2.13xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose server instance featuring 56 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 2.5 GHz. It is equipped with 224.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core, but lacks local storage and GPU hardware. Operating on a KVM hypervisor, it delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps. Performance benchmarks indicate weak single-core capabilities, but average multi-core CPU and memory bandwidth performance, with strong multi-threaded bzip3 decompression. This resource profile makes the instance qualitatively cost-efficient for highly parallelized workloads, including multi-threaded data processing, software compilation, and static web serving, while remaining less optimal for single-threaded applications.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2.13xlarge is a general-purpose server with 56 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 224 GB RAM, and 10 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering average multi-core performance for parallel workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2.13xlarge features 56 dedicated Intel Xeon cores and 224 GB RAM, offering balanced multi-core performance for parallel workloads.
tagline: A dedicated 56-core x86_64 server with balanced memory configuration, optimized for highly parallelized multi-threaded workloads and static web serving.
bullet_points: 56 dedicated physical Intel Xeon cores with 1.0 thread per core
224.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth on a KVM hypervisor
Strong multi-threaded decompression and average multi-core benchmark performance
No local storage or GPU accelerators included in the configuration
Best suited for parallel software compilation, web serving, and multi-threaded data tasks
